title: Filmcraft (Fan Mod)
description: Brings minecraft movie items into minecraft
body:
This mod is designed to bring items and features inspired by the Minecraft movie into the base game. The goal is to let players experience new and exciting content based on the movie's universe while staying true to the style and mechanics of Minecraft.

Currently, the mod includes several unique items from the movie, such as the Potato Launcher, a fun and powerful ranged weapon that fires potatoes; the Diamond Battle Axe, a strong melee weapon with high damage output; and the Lava Chicken, a fiery food item that restores hunger and offers a cinematic twist on traditional Minecraft cuisine. These are just the beginning—and more movie-inspired content is planned as new information about the film is released.

Whether you're a long-time Minecraft player or liked the minecraft movie, this mod adds a fresh and imaginative layer to your gameplay experience. Additional items and features will be introduced in future updates to further expand the connection between the game and the cinematic world.

Feedback is always welcome, and your suggestions can help shape the direction of future updates!
